Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
Subject: Employee leaving the company
Response: To merge multiple HackerRank accounts, log in to HackerRank Community ([https://www.hackerrank.com/auth/login](https://www.hackerrank.com/auth/login)) using the credentials of the account you want to keep. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner, then select "Settings" from the drop-down menu. In the "Merge Accounts" section, enter the username and email address of the account you want to merge.  A confirmation message will be sent to your email inbox upon successful merge.
Justification: This action requires verification to ensure account integrity and prevent potential security risks associated with multiple accounts.  The process involves a manual configuration step to consolidate data.
